name: Hercules

г…Өг…Ө

г…Ө

Disney's Kind, brave, charismatic Hero of Theobes! Hercules may look tall, bronze and intimidating, but he's actually a rather naive, charming and humble guy. He gets shy really easily, but can put up a tough facade for the safety and security of others, being the symbol of peace, the hallmark of a Hero.

г…Ө

Name: Hercules (Roman); Heracles (Greek)

Height: 6'5

Age: 19

Sex: Male

Allignment: Lawful Good

г…Өг…Ө

г…Ө

рқҷҝрқҡҺрқҡӣрқҡңрқҡҳрқҡ—рқҡҠрқҡ•рқҡ’рқҡқрқҡў: Humble, mighty, klutz, fearless, justice-Seeking, heroic, kindhearted, inarticulate, tough, dependable, charismatic, friendly, honest, juvenile, shy, brave, chivalrous, semi-traditional.

г…Өг…Ө

г…Ө

рҹҮёвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢрҹҮ№вҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢрҹҮҙвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢрҹҮ·вҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢрҹҮҫ

г…Ө

Hercules was born on Mount Olympus; his parents are the gods Zeus & Hera. On the celebration of his birth, the Olympian Gods present him with a multitude of gifts. Zeus himself creates the winged-horse, "Pegasus" as a gift for Hercules. One god is not happy about the new arrival: Zeus' brother, Hades. Unbeknownst to the other gods, Hades wants to take control of Mount Olympus & the world, but according to the Fates' prophecy, if Hercules chooses to fight him, his plans will be ruined.

Knowing that as a God, Hercules is immortal, Hades sends his two lackeys, "Pain" & "Panic," to kidnap child Hercules & turn him into a mortal with a magic potion. Although they succeed in half the plan, they are interrupted by two human peasants "Amphytryon" & "Alcmene" before Hercules finishes drinking the last drop of the potion, demoting him to demigod. The human couple Amphytryon & Alcmene adopt hercules, since they were childless. Too late, Zeus & the other gods discover the kidnapping. Because Hercules is now considered a mortal, they are unable to help him return to Olympus.

г…Ө

г…Өг…Ө

Years later, Hercules is raised as a polite, hardworking farm-boy in the mortal human world & tries to be a good son to Amphytryon & Alcmene. Hercules was a courageous youth but clumsy & inept, his clumsiness & inability to control of his immense strength caused him to humiliate himself & accidentally destroy things. The townsfolk would call him things like вҖңJerk-ules" due to his history of clumsiness. Young Herc had an energetic, naive quality. His insecurity stemmed from how out of place he felt amongst the humans.
